Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: WITH case_event_counts AS SELECT case_id COUNT AS event_count FROM event_log GROUP BY case_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: SELECT el case_id el activity el timestamp FROM event_log AS el JOIN case_event_counts AS cec ON el case_id equals cec case_id WHERE cec event_count less than or equal to 6 ORDER BY el case_id el timestamp

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Groups rows by case_id and counts how many events each case contains event_count This gives us the total number of events per case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Joins the original event_log with the CTE on case_id so we can filter based on the computed count The WHERE clause keeps only rows where event_count is six or fewer The ORDER BY ensures the output is sorted by case and timestamp which is often useful for readability
